text_block_list.text: …Before I knew it, several seasons had passed since I started my search for Stay Gold.
I haven't seen her at all on the academy grounds in that time , so I've expanded my search to outside the academy in hopes of finding any clue about her—

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
…Ah～ 
This right here… is relaxing…
choice_data_list: —Stay Gold!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
…Oh～! It's been awhile. 
Look like you're doing alright
choice_data_list: You… remember me?
You… remember me?

text_block_list.text:
Of course I do. 
I don't really forget good journeys.
text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
choice_data_list: …I wanted to talk to you again.
…I wanted to talk to you again.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Now aren't you fired up. Alright, I'll hear you out. 
…The race just finished now too.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
—That said, you did quite well to find me. 
What trick did you use?
choice_data_list: I used those "tracks" as a hint.
I used those "tracks" as a hint.

text_block_list.text: …When she told me about those "tracks" before, there was a place so substantial, it was mentioned several times.
I thought that perhaps, I could find Stay Gold at that place. With that hope in mind, I started making the rounds.
So I started to search at any place that could have her tracks. Going off of hints I've gained I ended up all the way in Sapporo…
choice_data_list: I'm sorry for tracking you down like this.
I'm sorry for tracking you down like this.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
I don't really mind. 
If anything, I should applaud your effort.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
…Well? 
You wanted to ask me about something, about that person who was in my story, right?
choice_data_list: …Yeah. I want to know who they are.
…Yeah. I want to know who they are.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Well, this is also a fateful encounter. 
Sure, I can tell you more about that person—

…Hmm. Telling it once again is… probably not good. 
…Alright.
text_block_list.name: Stay Gold

text_block_list.text:
Hey, go on back to the academy and wait for me. 
…I got something interesting to show you.
choice_data_list: …Something interesting?
text_block_list.name: Stay Gold

text_block_list.text: Yeah. I'm certain that it'll be faster to show you then tell you… Don't worry, I'm not gonna vanish to the wind.
text_block_list.name: Stay Gold

text_block_list.text: Once everything's ready, I'll head on over. That's it for today. …Ah, there's a ramen place across the street from here. I recommend their salted ramen.
text_block_list.name: Stay Gold

text_block_list.text:
…A few days have since passed since meeting with Stay Gold. 
I've been called to a certain place after getting a "All ready" from her—

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: —And that makes 14 people. Everyone has shown up.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Yup, thanks. Sorry for springing 
this request on you, Air Groove.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Not at all… finding a way for you take running more seriously was a point of concern of the student council already. To that end, we're happy to help.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Moving on! Just what type of scrimmage 
do you have planned!?

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Ah, everyone here is gonna race with me on a 2400m counterclock-wise turf track.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
And it's gonna be at the Tokyo Racecourse. 
Everyone, show me all that you got.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: These conditions! My El-stincts are saying it's like the "Japanese Derby"! That or it's the "Japan Cup"! Uuuu, I'm getting fired up!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Haha. That's good, I ask that you keep that up. 
…Okay, time to get ready.

I still don't know what she wants to show me through all this. 
While left in the dark, the runners took their positions…

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: —What's about to take place… is a special race.
After hearing that story, you got interested in me, came all the way to the edge following me. Since you've gone this far…… you'll probably… be able to see it.
text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
choice_data_list: What on Earth are you planning?
What on Earth are you planning?

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Oh, if you hear a voice, trust it. 
That's the only secret. …I'll see you afterwards.
Then, the scrimmage began—

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
As expected of you Groove! 
What terrifying pressure!

Don't think that's all I got! 
Ready yourself, El!
text_block_list.name: Air Groove

text_block_list.text:
…Watching them compete, something inside me… 
some mysterious feeling started to swell.
choice_data_list: (This scene…)

text_block_list.text:
[—Number 11, it's El Condor Pasa! 
And on the inside is number 1, Air Groove!]
Was that my imagination? As the race continued to unfold, it feels like I've seen this somewhere before—

text_block_list.name: El & Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
—Yaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaah!! 
—Haaaaaaaaaaaaaaaah!!

[And here comes El Condor Pasa! From the inside is Air Groove! 
Air Groove is coming from the inside!!]
choice_data_list: (No, there's no way! I've seen this—!

text_block_list.text: In the final stretch, as the fight for the lead between those two unfolded, I felt my heart beat and my fist clenching uncontrollably!

[Japanese ■■■■■s are all on top!! 
And at the front! It's El Condor Pasaaaaaa!!!]

It was like I was there, in both worlds. 
A rush of excitement and sense of reality 
coursed through my body—

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Senpai! Thank you so much for today! I was able to have such an amazing race. That was a great experience for me!!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Nice～, that's the most important thing. 
…It's been a while, but I was also able to see something great.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
…For allowing me to have a wonderful experience, thank you. 
You should also try to strive further—

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
…Man, those guys sure are tough. 
10th place once again.
choice_data_list: —Stay Gold!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it looks like… you saw something. 
I'm willing to bet that we're bound together by fate.
choice_data_list: Do you… know anything about that?
Do you… know anything about that?

text_block_list.text: To be honest… I thought that if you were able to see it and experience it yourself, you'd believe in it more than just me talking about it.
text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
You said it yourself. Even after researching 
you couldn't confirm their existence.

…Of course you wouldn't. 
After all, they don't exist in this world at all.
choice_data_list: Huh—
text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: …That person is—

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: —me from a different world. Another Stay Gold.
